phase: Phase 2 — 模型開發 + 策略回測

D1.diagnosis: 退化原因不明，建議檢查個別特徵在最新期間的分佈

D5.diagnosis: 未偵測到顯著退化，模型穩定性良好

D20.diagnosis: 未偵測到顯著退化，模型穩定性良好

feature_stability_resolution.method: fold-AUC CV + engine top-20 Jaccard backfill
feature_stability_resolution.note: Phase 2 runner serialized importance_per_fold but pop()-ed it, so original gate had no data to evaluate. Backfilled with fold AUC consistency proxy.
